name: IRSF-002.1: Seizure & Mortality Incidence — Severe MECP2 (R168X/R255X/R270X)
description: Incidence rate analysis for seizure onset and all-cause mortality in the Severe MECP2 (R168X/R255X/R270X) genotype subgroup (cohort 198). Outcomes: first seizure onset (CSS Epilepsy subscale > 0, cohort 210) and all-cause mortality (cohort 211). Age-stratified with pediatric bins (0-4, 5-9, 10-17, 18+). Gender-stratified to detect sex-linked differences (relevant for MECP2 duplication which affects males).
